name: Weekly smenso Project Status Report via Email

nodes.notes:
Runs every Monday at 8:00 AM.
Adjust the cron expression to your preferred day and time.

nodes.name: Send Email

parameters.content:
## 📊 Weekly smenso Project Status Report via Email

**What this workflow does:**
Every Monday at 8:00 AM, it fetches all active projects from your smenso workspace and sends a formatted HTML status report via email — perfect for management reporting and weekly standups.

**Setup:**
1. Set your **smenso API** credentials
2. Set your **Gmail** credentials (or replace with Outlook / SMTP node)
3. Replace `YOUR_EMAIL@company.com` in the **Send Email** node with the recipient address

**Customize:**
- Change the schedule in **Every Monday at 8am** (cron: `0 8 * * 1`)
- Add more project fields in **Build HTML Report** (e.g. status, budget)
- Replace Gmail with **Microsoft Outlook** or **Send Email (SMTP)** node

**Tip:** Run smenso → Project → Get Many manually first to see which fields are available in your workspace.
